failure_asset.hypothesis_tested: train-only adverse-path avoidance and conditional early-abort score surface ranking closed-bar long and short candidates by low hazard before schedule replay
failure_asset.next_boundary: next C0003 work must change a meaningful path-conditioned exit, hold, risk-shape, label, model, or trade-shape surface; do not retry R0002 by only nudging hazard quantiles, stop or target multiples, early-abort bars, max-hold, or daily entry count
failure_asset.reason_not_candidate: fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence completed with 6 losing folds, 3 profitable folds, and negative total tick net PnL despite proxy entry frequency landing inside the target range

supporting_lessons.summary: Closed-bar logic parity passed exactly, while tick execution dropped 312 trades, improved total net PnL by 1.48 versus logic, and still remained negative; tick remains the economic surface.
Adverse-path avoidance improved R0001-like severity and produced 3 profitable folds, but total fold-isolated MT5 tick net PnL stayed negative.

hypothesis_variant.summary: test whether train-only adverse-path avoidance and conditional early-abort scoring can improve US100 M5 MT5 tick economics by rejecting high-hazard candidate paths before entry and scheduling conservative exits for accepted paths
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: second C0003 true variant; changes the R0001 path-survival risk profiling question into adverse-first avoidance and conditional abort logic using different labels, adverse-path features, score interpretation, and trade-shape construction; it is not a score quantile, window, SLTP, trail, max-hold, or daily-entry nudge of R0001

notes: closed-bar MT5 mode is required for proxy-vs-EA logic parity
tick-mode MT5 is required for execution KPI management
fold-isolated MT5 tick and execution divergence are required before closeout
weak proxy evidence cannot skip MT5 validation
proxy must derive adverse-path avoidance surfaces only inside each rolling train window
proxy must report entry frequency, adverse-path diagnostics, and conditional abort diagnostics without creating selected claims
proxy result cannot decide whether MT5 is attempted
mechanical parity must compare scheduled entries, directions, exits, exit reasons, and position lifecycle behavior
tick-vs-closed-bar differences are execution divergence, not automatic logic failure

feature.summary: closed-bar adverse-path features for directional wick pressure, prior adverse probes, range shock state, pullback stress, momentum stall, close-position vulnerability, and session phase; no feature set is selected

label.summary: train-only adverse-first and survivability labels penalizing stop-before-target, early adverse excursion, and poor terminal recovery while rewarding paths that avoid material adverse movement; no label is selected

model.summary: rolling train-only adverse-path avoidance stump score surface for ranking candidates by low hazard and assigning conditional abort or follow-through profiles; no model family, objective, or score threshold is selected

trade_logic.summary: evaluate broad closed-bar long and short candidate events with fixed-lot discovery, skip high-hazard candidate bars via daily low-hazard ranking, and schedule conservative stop, target, early-abort, and max-hold behavior for accepted paths
